SessionStart.command: echo '📊 Vault Status:' && echo '- Inbox files:' && find '0 Inbox' -name '*.md' -not -path '0 Inbox/_processed/*' 2>/dev/null | wc -l && echo '- Active projects:' && ls -d 1 Projects/*/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
SessionStart.description: Show vault status on session start

notes.SessionStart: Runs when a new Claude Code session starts. Displays quick status overview.
notes.PostToolUse: Runs after Write or Edit tools. Logs modifications to AI-Log/sessions/changes.log
